si.t: This document was exported from Numbers. Each table was converted to an Excel worksheet. All other objects on each Numbers sheet were placed on separate worksheets. Please be aware that formula calculations may differ in Excel.
Live counts pull from the Tracker tab. Update Tracker as roles move.
Strong fit: foodservice relationships, operator credibility, sales and territory growth.
General Manager, Retail Dining, Duke Hospital
Hospital dining GM fit, but still operations heavy.
Foodservice sales and operator relationship fit.
Strong aviation plus hospitality leadership story; specify RDU, CLT and selected cities.
Strong private club / F&B leadership option.
Strong beverage sales and market development alignment.
Revisit only if compensation is clear
Fun local role but likely schedule and compensation tradeoff.
Good B2B sales bridge into technical services; verify travel and base.
One of strongest fits: purchasing, inventory, forecasting, vendors, spoilage and Excel.
Remote analytical planning fit. Strong forecasting and inventory story.
Strong spirits and premium beverage fit.
Stretch due to GPO and foodservice management company experience requirement.
Requires direct ingredient/pastry/frozen dessert sales and heavy travel.
Strong beverage education and sales training fit.
Strong on premise beverage leadership fit.
Good restaurant operations to SaaS/customer success bridge.
Good inventory, merchandising, purchasing and event operations fit.
Strong sales and account fit, but probiotic and supplement channel is a gap.
Warm contact but current comp/title alignment unclear.
Sales and account management stretch outside hospitality.
Strong operations fit with local hybrid schedule.
Good SaaS lane but need active matching posting.
Good restaurant tech lane but likely more junior.
Director of Catering Sales, Raleigh Convention Center
Good sales, events and hospitality leadership fit.
Apply and submit tailored cover letter
Excellent fit: procurement, supplier management, analytics, cost savings, aviation education.
Aviation adjacent but too transactional and below compensation floor.
Strong fit selling premium foodservice products to chefs and operators.
Operations heavy, nights/weekends/holidays, limited career direction.
Events, planning and corporate environment bridge.
Good category fit, but likely title/pay step down.
Strong sales training and territory experience opportunity.
Strong procurement and buyer fit; cover letter created, application not confirmed.
Paste directly into LinkedIn/Indeed keyword search, or into Google as: site:linkedin.com/jobs [string]
Hospitality Leadership (F&B Director / GM / Beverage Director)
("Food and Beverage Director" OR "F&B Director" OR "Director of Food and Beverage") AND (steakhouse OR "fine dining" OR "luxury hospitality")
("General Manager" OR "Restaurant General Manager" OR "GM") AND (restaurant OR steakhouse OR "fine dining") NOT "QSR"
("Beverage Director" OR "Wine Director" OR "Director of Wine") AND (restaurant OR hospitality OR hotel)
("Assistant General Manager" OR "AGM") AND (restaurant OR "country club" OR "private club") AND (Raleigh OR Durham OR "Chapel Hill" OR Triangle)
("Restaurant Manager" OR "Operations Manager") AND ("fine dining" OR upscale OR luxury) AND (NC OR "North Carolina")
("District Sales Manager" OR "Territory Manager" OR "Key Account Manager") AND (wine OR spirits OR "beverage alcohol")
("Sales Representative" OR "Account Executive") AND (wine OR spirits OR distributor) AND (Carolinas OR "North Carolina" OR NC)
("Market Development Manager" OR "Brand Ambassador" OR "Portfolio Manager") AND (wine OR spirits OR beverage)
(sommelier OR "wine director" OR "beverage manager") AND ("on premise" OR "on-premise" account management)
("Account Executive" OR "Customer Success Manager" OR "Implementation Manager") AND (restaurant OR hospitality) AND (SaaS OR software) AND remote
("Sales Development Representative" OR "Account Manager") AND ("restaurant technology" OR "hospitality technology" OR "POS")
(restaurant OR hospitality) AND (SaaS OR platform) AND ("Account Executive" OR "Regional Sales Manager") AND remote
("Operations Manager" OR "General Manager" OR "Station Manager") AND (aviation OR airport OR FBO OR "fixed base operator")
("Customer Service Manager" OR "Ground Operations Manager") AND (airline OR airport OR aviation)
("General Manager" OR "Director of Operations") AND ("private aviation" OR "business aviation" OR charter)
("General Manager" OR "Operations Director" OR "Director of Operations") AND (hospitality OR luxury OR "guest experience")
("Regional Manager" OR "Multi-Unit Manager") AND (restaurant OR hospitality OR retail) NOT franchise
("Strategic Procurement" OR "Procurement Manager" OR "Sourcing Manager") AND (Raleigh OR Durham OR "Research Triangle")
("Buyer" OR "Purchasing Manager" OR "Category Manager") AND (foodservice OR hospitality OR aviation OR airport)
("Inventory Planner" OR "Demand Planner" OR "Supply Planner") AND (food OR beverage OR CPG OR ecommerce)
("Vendor Manager" OR "Supplier Manager" OR "Contracts Manager") AND (procurement OR sourcing OR supply)
("Airport Operations" OR "Airport Manager" OR "Station Manager") AND (RDU OR Raleigh OR Durham OR Morrisville)
("Commercial Manager" OR "Concessions Manager" OR "Revenue Manager") AND (airport OR aviation)
("Procurement" OR "Contracts" OR "Supply Chain") AND (airport OR aviation OR airline OR "ground handling")
("General Manager" OR "Operations Manager") AND (CLEAR OR Swissport OR Signature Aviation OR "Atlantic Aviation")
("Foodservice Sales" OR "Food Broker" OR "Key Account Specialist") AND (Raleigh OR Durham OR "North Carolina")
("Territory Sales" OR "Account Manager") AND (restaurant OR culinary OR foodservice) AND (Raleigh OR Durham)
("Wine Sales" OR "Spirits" OR "On Premise") AND ("North Carolina" OR Raleigh OR Durham)
Job Boards Beyond Indeed / LinkedIn / ZipRecruiter
Grouped by lane. URLs current as of research date; verify before relying on paid postings.
Hotel ops, F&B management, revenue management
20+ years in the space, strong for salaried hotel/restaurant management roles
Company profiles let you vet culture before applying
F&B, beverage, service roles incl. sommeliers/managers
2M+ member community, strong for restaurant groups; paid posting so fewer low-effort applicants
Broad hospitality reach via EmploymentCrossing network
Free posting tier exists; large resume database
Good if open to hotel-side GM/ops roles
Broader than wine — covers spirits, beer, non-alc too
WINE & BEVERAGE (relevant to your Wine Director background)
Industry-leading, 10,000+ postings/year, includes a comp/salary tracker
Run by a Master of Wine; smaller but curated
Posts salary ranges on most listings
Beverage alcohol boutique recruiting + job board
Also does executive search — worth a direct outreach
Tied to the SevenFifty B2B marketplace used by distributors
Best for credential-adjacent postings given your CMS track
Largest general aviation board; free resume posting; has a dedicated management category
Broad coverage, good if open to airport/ops-adjacent management
Business/private aviation, incl. FBO and ops management
Relevant given your luxury hospitality background — private aviation trends hospitality-adjacent
Airline hiring intel + listings, mostly flight deck but includes ops
Useful more for market intel than management roles
Hospitality finance, technology, and ops leadership
Niche but well-matched to your Veraya/tech-plus-hospitality profile
EXECUTIVE / RETAINED SEARCH (for GM, Director, F&B Director level)
Regional recruiters, often has unlisted client roles — worth a direct call
Candidate-friendly, no cost to job seekers
More hotel-executive skewed but worth being on their radar
Membership-based, positions you for retained-search visibility
